headline: Is the Options Market Predicting a Spike in Humana Stock?
summary: Investors need to pay close attention to Humana stock based on the movements in the options market lately.

raw.headline: Is the Options Market Predicting a Spike in Humana Stock?
raw.summary: Investors need to pay close attention to Humana stock based on the movements in the options market lately.

headline: Elevance Health Stock Slips. CMS to Halt Enrollment in Prescription Drug Plans.
summary: The agency plans to suspend enrollment of beneficiaries into certain Medicare Advantage plans, Elevance says.

raw.headline: Elevance Health Stock Slips. CMS to Halt Enrollment in Prescription Drug Plans.
raw.summary: The agency plans to suspend enrollment of beneficiaries into certain Medicare Advantage plans, Elevance says.
